Recent Posts

Designing a backpressure-aware job queue

July 2, 2026 · 8 min read

When a downstream service slows down, an honest queue tells upstream callers to slow down too. We walk through theLittle's Law arithmetic behind our bounded queue and the metrics we watch.

What we learned shipping structured logs

June 18, 2026 · 12 min read

Structured logs were supposed to make observability easier. They did — after we paid down three years of inconsistent field names. Here is the migration plan that worked.

A pragmatic guide to feature flags

June 4, 2026 · 6 min read

Feature flags buy you decoupled deploy and release, but they also buy you a forked codebase forever. We share the rules we use to keep the flag count bounded.

Why we stopped using ORMs

May 21, 2026 · 10 min read

ORMs promised to make SQL optional. After three years of N+1 queries and inscrutable generated plans, we went back to hand-written queries and never looked back.

Postmortem: the certificate renewal that wasn't

May 7, 2026 · 7 min read

A 60-day certificate quietly became a 0-day outage. The cron job ran, the alert didn't fire, and the failover target had already expired. Lessons from a quiet incident.

Reading the Postgres EXPLAIN output, for real

April 23, 2026 · 14 min read

EXPLAIN ANALYZE dumps a wall of numbers. We translate each one — sequential scans, nested loops, bitmap index scans — into a story about what the planner was thinking.
